description: Schema for pipeline feedback records — structured observations about classification or routing errors for offline analysis and prompt improvement.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the feedback was recorded

kind.description: Category of pipeline failure being reported

issue.description: Issue number or identifier associated with this feedback, e.g. 176

observed.description: What the pipeline actually did (the incorrect or unexpected behaviour)

expected.description: What the pipeline should have done (the correct or desired behaviour)

evidence_path.description: Relative path to a log file, JSONL event stream, or artifact that supports this feedback (optional)

notes.description: Free-form context, hypotheses, or reproduction steps (optional)
